info.title: Researcher admin overlay
info.description: Applies presentation-only x-oold-ui-* keywords to Researcher without editing the schema. An overlay is a general schema-patching mechanism (OpenAPI Overlay 1.1.0); UI annotation is one use case.

actions.description: Show the internal id for admins.
Render notes as a plain textarea instead of markdown.
Drop the render-time grouping for a flat admin form.
